headline: What HPE Stock’s AI Order Book Was Saying Before The Surge
summary: The company spent months detailing a multi-billion-dollar backlog of AI demand, but the real tell was how complacent the market had become just before the stock doubled.

headline: NetApp's Enterprise AI Bet: Can DataPelago Buyout Accelerate Growth?
summary: NTAP expands its AI infrastructure portfolio with DataPelago, bringing GPU-accelerated processing to storage and aiming to boost enterprise AI efficiency.

headline: StructureCraft Scales Data-Driven Design on NetApp
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., July 22, 2026--NetApp® (NASDAQ: NTAP), the Intelligent Data Infrastructure company, today announced that StructureCraft, an award-winning global structural engineering and construction firm known for complex timber and hybrid builds, is now using NetApp to modernize and create an AI-ready data infrastructure. The new infrastructure enables the company’s employees to collaborate globally, store and manage large-scale design workloads, and take advantage of AI-driven tools on a s

headline: The Real Signal In SanDisk Stock Was How Bad It Looked
summary: Before the memory chip maker surged over three thousand percent, its financials painted a picture of a business that was messy, unprofitable, and completely misunderstood.
